title: Impossible Things
tmdbOverview: After the death of her abusive husband, Matilde finds her new best friend in Miguel, her young, insecure, and disoriented neighbor.
synopsis: Released in 2021, Impossible Things is a family and drama film in Spanish. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 14 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
